title: Campaign types access different pretraining and demographics
insight: App Promotion campaigns on Meta are Reels-heavy and skew young by default. Static creatives are hard to scale, bid/cost caps are less reactive, and signal quality is lower through AEM. Web Sales campaigns have better placement distribution, scale on Facebook Feed, skew older, and benefit from higher signal quality via CAPI. Scaled brands spend 50% on statics in web campaigns. Choose campaign type based on the demographic you want to reach.
raw_excerpt: Campaign types access different pretraining — App campaigns skew young and Reels-heavy. Web campaigns with quizzes or landing pages break into older audiences on Feed placements.
source_title: App vs Web Acquisition — Direct2App vs Web2App Traffic Composition
actionable_steps: Use App Promotion campaigns to target younger users via Reels
Layer Web Sales campaigns to reach older, higher-converting audiences on Feed
Invest in static creatives for web campaigns — they scale better there
Compare placement composition between app and web campaigns monthly

title: ASO and organic installs lower blended CAC
insight: Meta-driven installs feed your app store ranking, which generates free organic installs. Ensure a strong install-to-rating conversion so paid acquisition builds organic momentum. Tight paid UA margins today become free organic revenue tomorrow. Design onboarding to generate ratings quickly, and bring in high-volume younger audiences to outpace competition in App Store Search rankings.
raw_excerpt: ASO and organic lower blended CAC — Meta-driven installs feed your app store ranking. Ensure a strong install to rating conversion. Tight UA margins today become free organic revenue tomorrow.
source_title: Breaking the Meta Ads Ceiling for Subscription Apps
actionable_steps: Track organic install lift alongside paid campaigns
Optimize onboarding to prompt ratings at the right moment
Use high-volume younger demographics to boost App Store rankings
Monitor blended CAC (paid + organic) rather than just paid CPI
